heading: Reports to Congress
label: 126 Reports to Congress
text: The Administrator of General Services, at times the Administrator considers desirable, shall submit a report to Congress on the administration of this subtitle. The report shall include any recommendation for amendment of this subtitle that the Administrator considers appropriate and shall identify any law that is obsolete because of the enactment or operation of this subtitle.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)12640:492., title II, § 212, formerly § 210, ; renumbered § 212, , .June 30, 1949, ch. 28863 Stat. 393Sept. 5, 1950, ch. 849, § 5(a)64 Stat. 580The words “in January of each year and” are omitted pursuant to section 3003 of the Federal Reports Elimination and Sunset Act of 1995 ( note). See, also, page 174 of House Document No. 103–7.31 U.S.C. 1113
